heading: Effect of transfers
label: 3447 Effect of transfers
text: The transfer of a function or office from an officer or agency to the Secretary or to the Department includes any aspects of such function or office vested in a subordinate of such officer or in a component of such agency.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 305 and is classified to .section 306 of Pub. L. 96–88section 3446 of this title
